auth.tagline: Every great trip starts with a single idea.
auth.taglineDescription: Plan smarter with AI-drafted itineraries you can shape into your own.
auth.registerDescription: Start planning your next trip in minutes.
auth.loginDescription: Log in to pick up where you left off.

settings.title: Profile & preferences
settings.description: The details used to personalize your AI-generated itineraries.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used by the app and new AI-generated plans.
settings.languageUpdateFailed: The app language changed on this device, but the profile could not be updated.
settings.loadFailed: Could not load settings. Confirm User Service is running.

trips.title: Your trips
trips.createDescription: Set the essentials — the AI drafts a full day-by-day itinerary you can refine.

notifications.workspaceInvited: You were invited to a workspace
notifications.tripSubmittedForApproval: A trip was submitted for approval

exports.costEstimateDisclaimer: Costs are estimates and may change.
exports.accountingDisclaimer: This is not an accounting or payment record.

tripDiscovery.knownDestination: I know where I want to go
tripDiscovery.knownDestinationHint: Create a trip with the destination form
tripDiscovery.pageDescription: Describe the feeling, budget, or pace you want. We’ll turn it into destinations worth considering.
tripDiscovery.heroSubtitle: Describe your ideal trip, or let AI surprise you based on your preferences and past trips.
tripDiscovery.promptLabel: What would make this trip feel right?
tripDiscovery.promptPlaceholder: E.g. A cheap 3-day trip with warm weather, good food, and not too much walking…
tripDiscovery.tripDetails: Add budget, duration, origin, or workspace
tripDiscovery.findingPlaces: Finding places that fit your travel style…
tripDiscovery.matchTooltip: Estimated fit based on your prompt, preferences, and past trips.
tripDiscovery.emptyBody: Try changing the budget, duration, or the way you describe your trip.
tripDiscovery.refineSubtitle: Tell us what feels off. Your next shortlist will adapt.
tripDiscovery.confirmDescription: Review the details before creating anything. Surprise Me never creates a trip automatically.
tripDiscovery.title: Trip title
tripDiscovery.autoGenerateHint: Create the draft and immediately queue an AI itinerary.
tripDiscovery.budgetDisclaimer: Estimated budgets are rough and do not include live flight or hotel prices. No booking is performed.
tripDiscovery.createError: Could not create the trip from this suggestion.
tripDiscovery.errorBody: Try again or adjust your prompt. No trip was created.

refineInstructions.lessWalking: Prioritize destinations that need less walking.
refineInstructions.similarPlaces: Show similar places, but not the same destination.
refineInstructions.betterFood: Prioritize destinations with excellent local food.
refineInstructions.betterMuseums: Prioritize destinations with strong museums and culture.
refineInstructions.notThisVibe: This suggestion is not the right vibe. Replace it with something meaningfully different.

planningConstraints.title: AI planning summary
planningConstraints.emptyPreview: Preview the settings that AI will use.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: The requested item could not be found.
errors.validationError: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.itineraryConflict: This itinerary changed elsewhere. Refresh and try again.
errors.editLockConflict: Someone else is currently editing this trip.
errors.workspacePolicyBlockingViolation: This change is blocked by workspace policy.
errors.providerRateLimited: The provider is busy. Try again shortly.
errors.providerQuotaExceeded: The provider quota has been reached.
errors.aiGenerationFailed: The itinerary could not be generated.
errors.repairProposalConflict: This repair proposal is based on an older itinerary.

validation.invalidCurrency: Enter a valid three-letter currency code.
